summary: Added internal/mcp/intents.go with 3 intent tools (pcgs_verify_and_extract, pcgs_batch_with_quota_guard, pcgs_pop_scarcity_report) and registered them in cmd/pcgs-pp-mcp/main.go.
reason: Endpoint-mirror MCP surface (14 tools) scored 5/10 on MCP Tool Design. Three hand-built intents compose multiple endpoints into agent-facing workflows (verify+extract chains facts-cert + images + apr-cert; quota-guard chains batch dry-run + execute; pop-scarcity wraps pop-curve + scarcity-bucket ranking). Filed as separate retro finding #1552 for the generator to auto-emit intents from research.json recipes.
validated_outcome: Scorecard MCP Tool Design 5→7; MCP surface mirrors 14 endpoints + 3 intents
